articles.author: Lena H. Sun, Sammy Westfall
articles.title: Americans may have been exposed in Congo Ebola outbreak - The Washington Post
articles.description: The WHO declared the outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern.
articles.content: A handful of Americans in the Democratic Republic of Congo may have been exposed to suspected cases of Ebola in an unusually large outbreak there that the WHO has declared to be a public health emerg… [+233 chars]

articles.title: Alex Cooper announces pregnancy, expecting 1st baby with husband Matt Kaplan - Good Morning America
articles.description: The "Call Her Daddy" host shared the pregnancy news in a sweet Instagram post.
articles.content:
Alex Cooper is preparing for a new role: motherhood.
The "Call Her Daddy" podcast host revealed Sunday that she and her husband, film producer Matt Kaplan, are expecting their first baby together.
